name: reflection
summary: Agent reviews its own output against a rubric before presenting it. Single-agent pattern — no extra processes.
when_to_use: Any single-shot generation task where quality matters more than speed. Default for /cc-intel, /cc-review.

layers.CLAUDE.md: Add rule: 'Review your own output before presenting. Check for off-by-one errors, unhandled edge cases, and inconsistency with existing code patterns.'
layers.skill: No skill required — behavior driven from CLAUDE.md.
layers.hook: Optional PostToolUse hook on Write|Edit that prompts Claude to self-verify before the next turn.
layers.agent: Consider agents/audit-reviewer.md for explicit second-pass review when risk is high.

cost: ~1.1x normal (one extra reasoning pass). Cheapest of all multi-shot patterns.
anti_patterns: Skipping reflection to save tokens — defeats the pattern and often costs more in rework.
Reflection after every tool call — use it once at the end, not in a loop.
